_note: CodeHumanist marketing-truths.json. 2026-04-30 trust-pillars recall reframed security promises as 'by design (audit pending)'. 2026-05-01 feature-register audit pass: waitlist backend + sidebar cleanup are now real (PR #3 + sidebar commit landed) — promoted from shipped_post_audit to product_claims. CodeHumanist's overall status (waitlist) remains accurate; substantive product build is still pending strategic decision.

product_claims.claim: Early access / waitlist — CodeHumanist is in early access. Join the waitlist to get first access when we launch.
Read-only codebase comprehension platform for human stakeholders — architecture, data flows and use cases for stakeholders who don't read code
product_claims.notes: Positioning of intended product. Acceptable while in early-access framing.

product_claims.claim: Read-only by design. CodeHumanist is built to be read-only — repository connections request read scopes only.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'CodeHumanist is read-only. It never modifies your code.' Reframed 2026-04-30 to 'by design' + 'audit pending' framing because no independent third-party security audit has been performed yet. Architecturally read-only is true (OAuth scopes), but the absolute promise was unaudited.
product_claims.recall_status: partial — apex landing 'never modifies your code' on index.html:115 retains the absolute framing as of 2026-05-12. Reframe pending Marc-decision per audit ad91eba9 (M-1).

product_claims.claim: No write access (by design). Repository OAuth tokens are requested at read scope only. Audit pending.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'No write access — Repository connections are read-only at the API level'. Same reframe.

product_claims.claim: No code execution (by design). The platform performs static analysis only — your code is never run in our environment.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'No code execution — We analyse structure, not runtime behaviour'. Strengthened the explanation while adding 'by design' qualifier.

product_claims.claim: Your data, your exports. All generated documentation is yours to download and keep.
product_claims.notes: Acceptable for early access. Verify file:line export functionality in next audit pass.

product_claims.claim: Waitlist signup with real email delivery — Cloudflare Pages Function routes submissions to Resend, no client-side-only deception.
product_claims.notes: Promoted from shipped_post_audit 2026-05-01. Same Pages Function + Resend pattern as instilligent-website contact form. RESEND_API_KEY via wrangler from MC's Railway env. Honeypot (`website` field), email regex, length caps in the Function. Routes hero + cta forms with source label.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was STUB — client-side localStorage only (submissions never left the user's browser). Replaced 2026-05-01 with real backend (PR #3).

product_claims.claim: Read-only by design — your codebase is never modified by our analysis (intended architecture, independent audit pending)
product_claims.notes: Promoted from shipped_post_audit 2026-05-01. Reframed the original '0 lines of code changed by CodeHumanist — ever' counter (which would become false on first production usage) into a durable architectural-promise framing consistent with the trust pillars. Visual treatment (highlight stat-card) preserved.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was '0 lines of code changed by CodeHumanist — ever'. Reframed 2026-05-01 because the absolute count would become false on first production analysis.

product_claims.claim: Generic error-page UX (404 / 500) with brand chrome + return-home + waitlist/support links. No product claims. Brand strings use canonical 'Instilligent Limited' and asset paths are absolute (work on non-root URLs).
product_claims.notes: Support surfaces enumerated for marketing-truth coverage per audit ad91eba9. Pages carry only generic error UX, footer brand ('Instilligent Limited' x3 in each), and contact links. Consolidated landing 2026-05-12 corrected a pre-merge non-canonical brand string to canonical 'Instilligent Limited' (audit ad91eba9 F-1, per feedback_brand_names.md + FTA s13(d)) and converted relative asset hrefs to absolute paths (audit ad91eba9 F-4) so the pages render correctly when served on non-root URLs.

product_claims.claim: XML sitemap at /sitemap.xml enumerating apex (/) and privacy policy. Referenced by robots.txt:69.
product_claims.notes: Created 2026-05-12 to honour the robots.txt Sitemap: declaration that previously pointed at a non-existent URL. Minimal — apex + privacy policy only. Update lastmod when adding pages.

open_items: Independent third-party security audit — required before general availability per the new 'audit pending' framing in the trust section. Audit results must be linked from the trust section once available, OR the 'by design' qualifier removed (CF task mtr-2026-04-30-ch-secaudit, P1, blocked by ch-product-build).

Full product backend (codebase comprehension engine) — entire product is 0→1 build. Site is honest as 'early access / waitlist'; substantive build is the next strategic decision (CF task mtr-2026-04-30-ch-product-build, P1, multi-week-month).
closed_items: codehumanist.cde.humanifest-removal — verified no-op 2026-05-01 (Humanifest reference not in current files; only in git history). Task closes.
verified_clean_directives: No partner / Anthropic / Microsoft / AWS claims
Status correctly framed as early access / waitlist (not 'Live')
Privacy policy already references read-only with privacy-policy-appropriate framing
